name: convalytics
description: Read-only analytics tools for AI assistants. Query top pages, top referrers, custom event counts, recent events, usage, and projects for your Convalytics account via Model Context Protocol. Requires a Convalytics API token generated at https://convalytics.dev/tokens and an active Solo or Pro plan.

auth.description: Convalytics API token. Create at https://convalytics.dev/tokens, pass as Authorization: Bearer cnv_...

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List all Convalytics projects on the team this token belongs to.

tools.name: get_usage
tools.description: Return the current month's custom-event usage, monthly quota, retention days, and plan name for the team.

tools.name: top_pages
tools.description: Return the top pages ranked by views in a time window, with unique visitors and share of total.

tools.name: top_referrers
tools.description: Return the top referring hosts ranked by visits, includes (direct).

tools.name: events_count
tools.description: Count custom events in a time window, optionally filtered to one event name.

tools.name: recent_events
tools.description: Return the most recent custom events; PII (userEmail, userName, props) is redacted by default.
